panels.title: Daily savings (€) — green = savings, red = loss

targets.query:
import "date"
import "timezone"
option location = timezone.location(name: "Europe/Brussels")
from(bucket: "zeus")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "zeus_daily_savings" and r._field == "eur")
  |> group(columns: ["_time"])
  |> last()
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"])
  |> map(fn: (r) => {
      y = date.year(t: r._time)
      m = date.month(t: r._time)
      d = date.monthDay(t: r._time)
      return {day: (if d < 10 then "0" else "") + string(v: d) + "/" + (if m < 10 then "0" else "") + string(v: m) + "/" + string(v: y), savings_eur: r._value}
    })
  |> keep(columns: ["day", "savings_eur"])

from(bucket: "zeus")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "zeus_daily_savings" and r._field == "eur")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"])
  |> cumulativeSum(columns: ["_value"])
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "Cumulative savings (€)"})

panels.title: Time in mode per day (hours) — charging / passthrough / discharging

targets.query:
hist = from(bucket: "zeus") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "zeus_mode_code" and r._field == "value")
live = from(bucket: "zeus") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "zeus_state" and r._field == "mode_code")
union(tables: [hist, live])
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"])
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: if r._value == 1.0 then 1.0 else 0.0}))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: r._value * 24.0}))
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "charging"})

hist = from(bucket: "zeus") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "zeus_mode_code" and r._field == "value")
live = from(bucket: "zeus") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "zeus_state" and r._field == "mode_code")
union(tables: [hist, live])
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"])
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: if r._value == 0.0 then 1.0 else 0.0}))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: r._value * 24.0}))
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "passthrough"})

hist = from(bucket: "zeus") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "zeus_mode_code" and r._field == "value")
live = from(bucket: "zeus") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "zeus_state" and r._field == "mode_code")
union(tables: [hist, live])
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"])
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: if r._value == 2.0 then 1.0 else 0.0}))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: r._value * 24.0}))
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "discharging"})

load_h = from(bucket: "zeus") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "zeus_load_history" and r._field == "kwh")
load_i = from(bucket: "zeus") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "zeus_realized_load_kwh" and r._field == "value")
load = union(tables: [load_h, load_i]) |> group() |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: mean, createEmpty: false) |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"]) |> rename(columns: {_value: "kwh"})
price_i = from(bucket: "zeus") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "zeus_import_price_eur_per_kwh" and r._field == "value")
price_l = from(bucket: "zeus") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "zeus_state" and r._field == "import_price_eur")
price = union(tables: [price_i, price_l]) |> group() |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: mean, createEmpty: false) |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"]) |> rename(columns: {_value: "price"})
join(tables: {l: load, r: price}, on: ["_time"])
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: r.kwh * r.price}))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: sum, createEmpty: false)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "Actual €/day"})

fl_i = from(bucket: "zeus") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "zeus_forecast_load_kwh" and r._field == "value")
fl_l = from(bucket: "zeus") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "zeus_forecast" and r._field == "load_kwh")
load = union(tables: [fl_i, fl_l]) |> group() |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: mean, createEmpty: false) |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"]) |> rename(columns: {_value: "kwh"})
price_i = from(bucket: "zeus") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "zeus_import_price_eur_per_kwh" and r._field == "value")
price_l = from(bucket: "zeus") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "zeus_state" and r._field == "import_price_eur")
price = union(tables: [price_i, price_l]) |> group() |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: mean, createEmpty: false) |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"]) |> rename(columns: {_value: "price"})
join(tables: {l: load, r: price}, on: ["_time"])
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: r.kwh * r.price}))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: sum, createEmpty: false)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "Forecast €/day"})

load_h = from(bucket: "zeus") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "zeus_load_history" and r._field == "kwh")
load_i = from(bucket: "zeus") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "zeus_realized_load_kwh" and r._field == "value")
load = union(tables: [load_h, load_i]) |> group() |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: mean, createEmpty: false) |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"]) |> rename(columns: {_value: "kwh"})
fl_i = from(bucket: "zeus") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "zeus_forecast_load_kwh" and r._field == "value")
fl_l = from(bucket: "zeus") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "zeus_forecast" and r._field == "load_kwh")
fload = union(tables: [fl_i, fl_l]) |> group() |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: mean, createEmpty: false) |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"]) |> rename(columns: {_value: "fkwh"})
price_i = from(bucket: "zeus") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "zeus_import_price_eur_per_kwh" and r._field == "value")
price_l = from(bucket: "zeus") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "zeus_state" and r._field == "import_price_eur")
price = union(tables: [price_i, price_l]) |> group() |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: mean, createEmpty: false) |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"]) |> rename(columns: {_value: "price"})
a = join(tables: {l: load, r: price}, on: ["_time"]) |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: r.kwh * r.price})) |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: sum, createEmpty: false) |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"]) |> rename(columns: {_value: "act"})
f = join(tables: {l: fload, r: price}, on: ["_time"]) |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: r.fkwh * r.price})) |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: sum, createEmpty: false) |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"]) |> rename(columns: {_value: "fc"})
join(tables: {a: a, f: f}, on: ["_time"])
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: if r.act - r.fc >= 0.0 then r.act - r.fc else r.fc - r.act}))
  |> mean()
  |> keep(columns: ["_value"])
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "MAE €/day"})

load_h = from(bucket: "zeus") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "zeus_load_history" and r._field == "kwh")
load_i = from(bucket: "zeus") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "zeus_realized_load_kwh" and r._field == "value")
load = union(tables: [load_h, load_i]) |> group() |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: mean, createEmpty: false) |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"]) |> rename(columns: {_value: "kwh"})
fl_i = from(bucket: "zeus") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "zeus_forecast_load_kwh" and r._field == "value")
fl_l = from(bucket: "zeus") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "zeus_forecast" and r._field == "load_kwh")
fload = union(tables: [fl_i, fl_l]) |> group() |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: mean, createEmpty: false) |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"]) |> rename(columns: {_value: "fkwh"})
price_i = from(bucket: "zeus") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "zeus_import_price_eur_per_kwh" and r._field == "value")
price_l = from(bucket: "zeus") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "zeus_state" and r._field == "import_price_eur")
price = union(tables: [price_i, price_l]) |> group() |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: mean, createEmpty: false) |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"]) |> rename(columns: {_value: "price"})
a = join(tables: {l: load, r: price}, on: ["_time"]) |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: r.kwh * r.price})) |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: sum, createEmpty: false) |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"]) |> rename(columns: {_value: "act"})
f = join(tables: {l: fload, r: price}, on: ["_time"]) |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: r.fkwh * r.price})) |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: sum, createEmpty: false) |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"]) |> rename(columns: {_value: "fc"})
join(tables: {a: a, f: f}, on: ["_time"])
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: if r.act - r.fc >= 0.0 then r.act - r.fc else r.fc - r.act}))
  |> sum()
  |> keep(columns: ["_value"])
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "Total €"})

hist = from(bucket: "zeus") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "zeus_soc_percent" and r._field == "value")
live = from(bucket: "zeus") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "zeus_state" and r._field == "soc_pct")
union(tables: [hist, live])
  |> group()
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 15m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "State of charge (%)"})
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"])

hist = from(bucket: "zeus") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "zeus_import_price_eur_per_kwh" and r._field == "value")
live = from(bucket: "zeus") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "zeus_state" and r._field == "import_price_eur")
union(tables: [hist, live])
  |> group()
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 15m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "Import price (€/kWh)"})
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"])

panels.title: Grid power (W) & Capacity tariff peak (kW) — history

targets.query:
hist = from(bucket: "zeus") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "zeus_grid_power_w" and r._field == "value")
live = from(bucket: "zeus") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "zeus_state" and r._field == "grid_power_w")
union(tables: [hist, live])
  |> group()
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 15m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "Grid power (W)"})
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"])

hist = from(bucket: "zeus") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "zeus_capacity_peak_kw" and r._field == "value")
live = from(bucket: "zeus") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "zeus_state" and r._field == "capacity_peak_kw")
union(tables: [hist, live])
  |> group()
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: max, createEmpty: false)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "Capacity peak (kW)"})
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"])
